session_state_serialized_size_bytes.note: Not measured end-to-end because a real Streamlit runtime and live state hydration were unavailable in the container.

database_query_time_seconds.note: Not measured end-to-end; no stable live DB workload was replayed in the container.

repeated_render_duration_seconds.note: Not measured end-to-end; render timing requires a live Streamlit UI session.

full_calculation_duration_seconds.note: Not measured end-to-end because external connectors/live data were not exercised in the container.

peak_rss_bytes.note: Not measured reliably across full Streamlit runs in this container.

notes: Compileall was measured directly on the uploaded baseline extraction and on the final packaged project.
App startup was measured as a stubbed import smoke test because streamlit is not installed in the container.
Claims about full runtime improvements are intentionally omitted where no trustworthy before/after measurement was available.
